title: Oosthuizen, Marais & Pretorius Attorneys joins PH Attorneys in strategic expansion
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are proud to announce our...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are proud to announce our acquisition by national law firm PH Attorneys, marking a significant milestone in the longstanding relationship between the two firms.


> This strategic move builds on years of collaboration and OMP’s 15-year membership in the PH Group, South Africa’s Largest Legal Network, founded by PH Attorneys in 2006.


As part of the acquisition, OMP will officially rebrand as PH Attorneys (Southern Cape), strengthening the firm’s regional presence and expanding the range of legal services available to clients in the Southern Cape.

PH Attorneys is a full-service law firm operating under a unified national brand, with offices in Bloemfontein, Cape Town, Sandton and now Mossel Bay.

The integration will provide clients with access to broader practice areas, advanced technologies and a larger team of experienced professionals - ensuring exceptional results and high-quality legal services.

New brand celebrated

The new brand was unveiled at an exclusive client event on 29 January 2026 at the Mossel Bay offices, attended by clients, staff and key stakeholders.

Pictured at the PH Attorneys (Southern Cape) rebrand launch are (from left) Danie le Roux, National Head: Commercial Practice Group; Nico Marais, Director: Property; Lesley Mokgoro, CEO and National Head: Dispute Resolution Practice Group; and Jan Berry, Director: Commercial. The event marked OMP Attorneys’ official integration into the PH Attorneys national brand.

The celebration highlighted the firm’s journey, its integration into the PH brand and the exciting opportunities ahead.

The rebrand includes a refreshed corporate identity, updated digital and physical branding and enhanced client offerings.


> “This is an exciting milestone for our firm,” said Nico Marais, Director at OMP. “While our name and brand have evolved, our values, our people, and the quality of service our clients rely on remain unchanged.”


Lesley Mokgoro, National CEO of PH Attorneys, added: “We are thrilled to welcome the OMP team. By joining forces, we aim to introduce a new dimension to the legal landscape in the region and strengthen existing client relationships.

"Clients can expect the same trusted service, now backed by the resources and expertise of a national firm.”


> Clients in Mossel Bay and the surrounding areas can continue to expect the highest standard of legal expertise - now with the added strength and support of PH Attorneys.


The new PH Attorneys (Southern Cape) branding unveiled at the Mossel Bay offices following the firm’s integration into the PH Attorneys national network.

For more information, visit www.phinc.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
